title: penstemon confertus
intro: Penstemon confertus, also known as the dense blazing star, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its antibacterial and expectorant properties. Penstemon confertus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
